original: This small addition to your CODEX enables LIDAR mapping of your immediately surrounding locale, enhancing the systems ability to map out nearby topography and structures, but only within direct line of sight.
context: <<POS:05335333>> -based mapping tool",e.tooltip='This small addition to your CODEX enables LIDAR mapping of y'

original: This small addition to your CODEX enables active RADAR mapping of your nearby locale, enhancing the systems ability to map out nearby topography and structures.
context: <<POS:05336289>> -based mapping tool",e.tooltip='This small addition to your CODEX enables active RADAR mappi'

original: This software plugin and communication reciever for your CODEX ties into your ships sensor systems, enabling orbital mapping of your surrounding area. Due to sensor limitations, the system cannot map the interior of caves and other covered structures.
context: <<POS:05337191>> -based mapping tool",e.tooltip='This software plugin and communication reciever for your COD'
